metadata.description: Add TwAnnotation struct and annotations field to TWTask; add priority field to VTODO; add project field to IREntry.

task-1-1.title: Add TwAnnotation struct and annotations to TWTask

metadata.description: Add TwAnnotation struct with #[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)], entry: DateTime<Utc> (with tw_date), description: String. Add annotations: Vec<TwAnnotation> to TWTask with #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = "Vec::is_empty")]. Add roundtrip test.
acceptance_criteria: TwAnnotation has entry: DateTime<Utc> (with tw_date), description: String
TWTask.annotations is Vec<TwAnnotation> with serde(default, skip_serializing_if)
Existing tw_task_roundtrip_minimal test still passes
New roundtrip test asserts annotations[0].description == "check expiry date"

metadata.description: Add #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")] pub priority: Option<u8> to VTODO struct.
acceptance_criteria: VTODO.priority is Option<u8> with skip-if-none serde
Existing test_round_trip_basic in ical.rs still passes

metadata.description: Add #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")] pub project: Option<String> to IREntry struct.
acceptance_criteria: IREntry.project is Option<String> with serde default and skip-if-none
All existing IR tests still pass

metadata.description: Run cargo test and confirm all tests pass.
Parse PRIORITY from VTODO iCal text and serialize it back. Add 4 unit tests.
Add priority: Option<u8> = None initialization. Add match arm for PRIORITY: value.trim().parse::<u8>().ok().filter(|&v| v > 0). Include priority in Ok(VTODO { ... }) return.
acceptance_criteria: VTODO string with PRIORITY:3 -> vtodo.priority == Some(3)
VTODO string with PRIORITY:0 -> vtodo.priority == None
VTODO string without PRIORITY -> vtodo.priority == None

metadata.description: After RRULE emission block, add: if let Some(p) = vtodo.priority { lines.push(format!("PRIORITY:{}", p)); }
acceptance_criteria: to_icalendar_string with priority = Some(1) contains PRIORITY:1
to_icalendar_string with priority = None does NOT contain PRIORITY
Round-trip: parse -> serialize -> parse preserves priority value

task-2-3.title: Add ical.rs unit tests for PRIORITY

metadata.description: Add 4 tests: priority_parsed_from_vtodo, priority_zero_treated_as_absent, priority_serialized_to_vtodo, priority_absent_not_emitted.
acceptance_criteria: All 4 tests pass: priority_parsed_from_vtodo, priority_zero_treated_as_absent, priority_serialized_to_vtodo, priority_absent_not_emitted

metadata.description: Run cargo test and confirm all tests pass.
Rename TwCalDavFields.description to summary; add annotations and priority fields. Fix CalDavTwFields. Update both conversion functions. Add 11 unit tests.
Rename description: Option<String> to summary: Option<String>. Add annotations: Option<String>. Add priority: Option<u8> (iCal integer value 1/5/9).
acceptance_criteria: TwCalDavFields has summary: Option<String>, annotations: Option<String>, priority: Option<u8>
No field named description on TwCalDavFields

metadata.description: Fix doc comment on description to say 'VTODO SUMMARY -> TW description'. Add annotations_text: Option<String>. Add priority: Option<String> (TW format).
acceptance_criteria: CalDavTwFields has description: String, annotations_text: Option<String>, priority: Option<String>
Doc comment on description says 'VTODO SUMMARY -> TW description'

metadata.description: Map task.description to summary with (no title) reverse sentinel. Populate annotations from task.annotations.first(). Populate priority: H->1, M->5, L->9.
acceptance_criteria: Task description="Buy milk" -> summary=Some("Buy milk")
Task description="(no title)" -> summary=None (reverse sentinel)
Task with annotation {description:"check expiry"} -> annotations=Some("check expiry")
Task with no annotations -> annotations=None
Task priority=Some("H") -> priority=Some(1u8)
Task priority=None -> priority=None

metadata.description: Change description source to vtodo.summary.unwrap_or("(no title)"). Add annotations_text from vtodo.description filtered for empty/whitespace. Add priority conversion: 1-4->H, 5->M, 6-9->L, _->None.
acceptance_criteria: VTODO summary=Some("X"), description=None -> description=="X", annotations_text==None
VTODO summary=Some("X"), description=Some("note") -> description=="X", annotations_text==Some("note")
VTODO summary=None -> description=="(no title)"
VTODO priority=Some(1) -> Some("H"); Some(2)->Some("H"); Some(5)->Some("M"); Some(9)->Some("L"); None->None

task-3-5.title: Update writeback.rs field references after struct rename

metadata.description: Mechanical find-replace in src/sync/writeback.rs: rename fields.description -> fields.summary so the codebase compiles. No annotation/priority/project logic yet.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test compiles and passes at end of Phase 3
No functional logic changed - only field name references updated

metadata.description: Add 11 tests: caldav_summary_mapped_to_tw_description, caldav_both_summary_and_description_present, caldav_description_mapped_to_annotations, caldav_no_summary_gives_no_title_sentinel, tw_description_becomes_summary, tw_no_title_becomes_absent_summary, tw_annotations_become_description, priority_tw_to_caldav_h, priority_caldav_to_tw_1_gives_h, priority_caldav_2_3_4_give_h, priority_caldav_5_gives_m_9_gives_l_0_gives_none.
acceptance_criteria: All 11 new tests pass
Existing tests updated (fields.description -> fields.summary) and passing

metadata.description: Run cargo test and confirm all tests pass.

phase-4.title: IR Layer — Project for CalDAV-only Entries (ir.rs)

metadata.description: Populate IREntry.project for CalDAV-only entries by reverse-looking up the project name from config.calendars.

Define const DEFAULT_PROJECT: &str = "default". Add fn resolve_project_from_url(url: &str, config: &Config) -> Option<String> that normalizes URLs (trim_end_matches('/')) and filters out DEFAULT_PROJECT.
acceptance_criteria: URL matching project="work" -> Some("work")
URL matching project="default" -> None
URL not matching any entry -> None
URL differing only by trailing slash still matches
"Default" (different case) returns Some("Default") - does not match DEFAULT_PROJECT

task-4-2.title: Populate entry.project in build_ir CalDAV-only pass

metadata.description: In the CalDAV-only pass of build_ir, compute let project = resolve_project_from_url(&calendar_url, config) and set project on the new IREntry.
acceptance_criteria: CalDAV-only entry with calendar_url matching project="work" -> entry.project = Some("work")
CalDAV-only entry with calendar_url matching project="default" -> entry.project = None
TW-only and paired entries still have entry.project = None

task-4-3.title: Add IR unit tests for project injection

metadata.description: Add 2 tests: caldav_only_entry_gets_project_from_config and caldav_only_entry_with_default_project_gets_none.
acceptance_criteria: caldav_only_entry_gets_project_from_config: config [("work","http://dav/work/")], VTODO in work calendar -> entry.project == Some("work")
caldav_only_entry_with_default_project_gets_none: config [("default","http://dav/cal/")], VTODO -> entry.project == None
Existing IR tests unaffected

metadata.description: Run cargo test and confirm all tests pass.
Fix build_vtodo_from_tw and build_tw_task_from_caldav; add now parameter; apply Annotation Slot Invariant and LWW merge policy.
Add now: DateTime<Utc> parameter. Update two call sites in execute_op (PullFromCalDav and ResolveConflict CalDAVWins). Update test helpers to use a fixed deterministic timestamp.
acceptance_criteria: build_tw_task_from_caldav signature includes now: DateTime<Utc>
All call sites (production and test) compile and pass now

metadata.description: Change summary: fields.description to summary: fields.summary. Change description to fields.annotations. Add priority: fields.priority to VTODO struct literal.
acceptance_criteria: vtodo.summary = fields.summary (may be None for (no title))
vtodo.description = first annotation text, or None
vtodo.priority = fields.priority
vtodo.summary != vtodo.description when no annotations

metadata.description: Priority: priority: fields.priority (no fallback). Project: base.map_or_else(|| entry.project.clone(), |t| t.project.clone()). Annotations: implement all 6 branch cases from Annotation Slot Invariant (0/1/>=2 x Some(text)/None).
acceptance_criteria: CalDAV PRIORITY:1 -> TW priority = Some("H")
CalDAV PRIORITY:None -> TW priority = None (no fallback)
DESCRIPTION:text, base 0 annotations -> one annotation created
DESCRIPTION:text, base 1 annotation identical -> no-op
DESCRIPTION:text, base 1 annotation different -> replaced
DESCRIPTION:text, base 2+ annotations different -> slot 0 replaced, slots 1+ preserved
No DESCRIPTION, base has annotations -> no-op
CalDAV-only entry with entry.project=Some("work") -> TW project=Some("work")
Paired entry: project inherited from existing TW task

metadata.description: Add 3 tests: build_vtodo_from_tw_uses_summary_not_description, build_tw_task_caldav_only_injects_project, build_tw_task_reads_summary_as_description.
acceptance_criteria: build_vtodo_from_tw_uses_summary_not_description: vtodo.summary==Some("Buy milk"), vtodo.description==None
build_tw_task_caldav_only_injects_project: entry.project=Some("work") -> tw_task.project==Some("work")
build_tw_task_reads_summary_as_description: vtodo.summary=Some("X") -> tw_task.description=="X"
Existing writeback tests still pass

metadata.description: Run cargo test and confirm all tests pass.
Add 5 new blackbox test scenarios to tests/robot/suites/07_field_mapping.robot.

task-6-1.title: Add S-64: CalDAV SUMMARY-only task → TW description

metadata.description: Create a CalDAV VTODO with SUMMARY set, no DESCRIPTION line; sync; assert TW task description == SUMMARY value.
acceptance_criteria: VTODO with SUMMARY:Buy oat milk -> TW description == "Buy oat milk"

task-6-2.title: Add S-65: CalDAV DESCRIPTION-only task → TW sentinel and annotation

metadata.description: Create a CalDAV VTODO with SUMMARY line absent (not empty), DESCRIPTION present; sync; assert TW description == "(no title)" and one annotation.
acceptance_criteria: VTODO with no SUMMARY line and DESCRIPTION:A note about milk -> TW description == "(no title)"
TW task has annotation with description "A note about milk"
SUMMARY line is truly absent (keyword must not emit SUMMARY:)

task-6-3.title: Add S-66: TW task with annotation → CalDAV DESCRIPTION set, SUMMARY not duplicated

metadata.description: Create TW task with description and annotation; sync to CalDAV; assert SUMMARY == task description, DESCRIPTION == annotation text, SUMMARY != DESCRIPTION.
acceptance_criteria: VTODO SUMMARY == TW description; DESCRIPTION == annotation text; SUMMARY != DESCRIPTION

task-6-4.title: Add S-67: CalDAV PRIORITY → TW priority mapping

metadata.description: Create three CalDAV VTODOs with PRIORITY:1, PRIORITY:5, PRIORITY:9; sync; assert TW priority H, M, L respectively.
acceptance_criteria: PRIORITY:1 -> priority == "H"; PRIORITY:5 -> priority == "M"; PRIORITY:9 -> priority == "L"
TW task with priority=H syncs to CalDAV with PRIORITY:1

task-6-5.title: Add S-68: CalDAV-only task in project calendar → TW project set

metadata.description: VTODO in work calendar; sync; assert TW project == "work". Use Skip If with MULTI_CALENDAR_ENABLED env var.
acceptance_criteria: CalDAV VTODO in work calendar -> TW project == "work" (or test is explicitly skipped)

metadata.description: Add entries for S-64 through S-68 with status markers reflecting actual RF run results.
acceptance_criteria: CATALOG.md contains entries for S-64, S-65, S-66, S-67, S-68 with status markers

verify-6-1.title: Run RF test suite — Phase 6 verification

metadata.description: Run CURRENT_UID=$(id -u) CURRENT_GID=$(id -g) docker compose -f tests/robot/docker-compose.yml run --rm robot and confirm S-64 through S-67 all pass; S-68 passes or is skipped.
Confirm all phases combine cleanly, all tests pass, no regressions.
Run cargo test and the Robot Framework suite. Confirm zero failures and >= 15 new Rust unit tests.
Use foundry-review skill to compare implementation against this spec.

journal.title: Task Completed: Add TwAnnotation struct and annotations to TWTask
journal.content: Added TwAnnotation struct with entry: DateTime<Utc> (tw_date serde) and description: String. Added annotations: Vec<TwAnnotation> to TWTask with skip_serializing_if = Vec::is_empty. Updated all struct literal sites across 11 source files + integration test. Added 2 tests: tw_task_annotation_roundtrip and tw_task_no_annotations_defaults_empty. Basic checks: cargo check and cargo test --lib pass (128 tests). Full cargo test deferred to verify-1-1.
journal.author: foundry-mcp

journal.title: Task Completed: Add priority field to VTODO
journal.content: Added priority: Option<u8> to VTODO struct with #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]. Added priority: None to all VTODO struct literals across src/ and tests/. Basic checks: 128 tests passing. Full test run deferred to verify-1-1.
journal.author: foundry-mcp

journal.title: Task Completed: Add project field to IREntry
journal.content: Added project: Option<String> to IREntry struct with #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]. Added project: None to all IREntry struct literals across src/ (build_ir production code + test helpers in 6 files). Basic checks: 128 tests passing. Full test run deferred to verify-1-1.

journal.title: Task Completed: Run cargo test — Phase 1 verification
journal.content: cargo test passes: 128 lib tests + 18 integration tests, 0 failures. All VTODO struct literals audited by Rust compiler (priority field required). All existing tests still pass (annotations defaults to empty vec, project defaults to None). New tests: tw_task_annotation_roundtrip and tw_task_no_annotations_defaults_empty both pass.

journal.title: Task Completed: Parse PRIORITY in from_icalendar_string
journal.content: Added priority: Option<u8> = None initialization. Added PRIORITY match arm with value.trim().parse::<u8>().ok().filter(|&v| v > 0). Updated Ok(VTODO{...}) to use priority variable. Basic checks passed.
journal.author: foundry-mcp

journal.title: Task Completed: Emit PRIORITY in to_icalendar_string

journal.content: Added 4 tests: priority_parsed_from_vtodo (PRIORITY:3 -> Some(3)), priority_zero_treated_as_absent (PRIORITY:0 -> None), priority_serialized_to_vtodo (Some(1) -> PRIORITY:1 in output, round-trip verified), priority_absent_not_emitted (None -> no PRIORITY line). All 4 pass.

journal.title: Status changed to in_progress
journal.content: Reading existing robot file to match patterns, then adding S-64 scenario
journal.author: foundry-mcp

journal.title: Task Completed: Add S-64: CalDAV SUMMARY-only task → TW description
journal.content: Added S-64 scenario to tests/robot/suites/07_field_mapping.robot. Test creates a CalDAV VTODO with only SUMMARY 'Buy oat milk' (no DESCRIPTION), syncs, then asserts TW task description == 'Buy oat milk' using the new TW.Get TW Task By Caldavuid keyword. Also added get_tw_task_by_caldavuid() method to TaskWarriorLibrary.py to support caldavuid-based TW task lookup. Basic checks: valid RF syntax, follows existing test patterns. Full test run deferred to verify-6-1."
journal.author: foundry-mcp

journal.title: Task Completed: Add S-65: CalDAV DESCRIPTION-only task → TW sentinel and annotation
journal.content: Added S-65 scenario to 07_field_mapping.robot. Added put_vtodo_with_description() to CalDAVLibrary.py (creates VTODO with DESCRIPTION but no SUMMARY line). Added tw_task_should_have_annotation() to TaskWarriorLibrary.py (asserts annotation description). Test creates VTODO with only DESCRIPTION 'A note about milk', syncs, then asserts TW description == '(no title)' and annotation == 'A note about milk'. Basic syntax check passed. Full test run deferred to verify-6-1."
journal.author: foundry-mcp

journal.title: Task Completed: Add S-66: TW task with annotation → CalDAV DESCRIPTION set, SUMMARY not duplicated
journal.content: Added S-66 scenario to 07_field_mapping.robot. Added add_tw_annotation() to TaskWarriorLibrary.py (runs 'task uuid annotate text'). Test creates TW task 'Pick up groceries', annotates with 'Don't forget the milk', syncs, then asserts VTODO SUMMARY == 'Pick up groceries', DESCRIPTION == 'Don't forget the milk', and SUMMARY != DESCRIPTION. CalDAV.Get VTODO Property (already exists) used to read both fields. Basic syntax check passed. Full test run deferred to verify-6-1."
journal.author: foundry-mcp

journal.title: Task Completed: Add S-67: CalDAV PRIORITY → TW priority mapping
journal.content: Added S-67 scenario to 07_field_mapping.robot. Added put_vtodo_with_priority() to CalDAVLibrary.py (creates VTODO with PRIORITY property). Test creates 3 VTODOs with PRIORITY 1/5/9, syncs, asserts TW priority H/M/L. Then creates TW task with priority H, syncs, asserts VTODO raw contains PRIORITY:1. Uses existing Modify TW Task for TW priority and Get VTODO Raw for CalDAV assertion. Basic syntax check passed. Full test run deferred to verify-6-1."
journal.author: foundry-mcp

journal.title: Task Completed: Add S-68: CalDAV-only task in project calendar → TW project set
journal.content: Added S-68 scenario to 07_field_mapping.robot. Test skips unless MULTI_CALENDAR_ENABLED env var is set. When enabled: creates a second 'work' CalDAV collection, puts a VTODO in it, runs sync with a two-calendar config (default + work), asserts TW task has project=='work', then deletes the work collection. Uses Get Environment Variable with empty default for the skip guard. Basic syntax check passed. Full test run deferred to verify-6-1."
journal.author: foundry-mcp
